findings.claim: The initial two-rule contract omits RULE-HIGH-VALUE-REVIEW. Fresh traces establish a 50000-cent boundary: STANDARD/DAMAGED returns refund at 49999 and enter manual review at 50000, while VIP/DAMAGED at 50000 also enters manual review instead of replacement.
findings.requiredAction: Add the 50000-cent high-value rule at priority 1, ahead of the VIP and STANDARD rules.

findings.claim: VIP replacement has a composite inventory effect: quarantine increases by one and sellable inventory decreases by one. A contract field that permits only one inventory effect cannot represent the observed behavior completely.
findings.requiredAction: Represent replacement inventory mutations as two effects, or define one composite effect containing sellable-minus-one and quarantine-plus-one.

findings.claim: The traces do not establish behavior for item conditions other than DAMAGED, customer tiers other than STANDARD and VIP, or invalid and out-of-range amounts.
findings.requiredAction: Keep these inputs outside the reconstructed contract until additional traces establish their behavior.

revisedRules.statement: Priority 1: within the observed domain of DAMAGED returns for STANDARD and VIP customers, amountCents greater than or equal to 50000 produces MANUAL_REVIEW, status PENDING_REVIEW, no inventory mutation, and a HIGH_VALUE review-queue side effect. This rule runs before tier-specific rules; behavior for other conditions or tiers is unknown.

Priority 2: after the high-value rule, a VIP, DAMAGED return with an observed valid amount below 50000 produces REPLACEMENT, status REPLACEMENT_ISSUED, refundCents 0, sellable-minus-one, quarantine-plus-one, and a shipment side effect. Behavior for other conditions and unobserved amount validity domains is unknown.

Priority 3: after the high-value rule, a STANDARD, DAMAGED return with an observed valid amount below 50000 produces REFUND for the full amount, status REFUNDED, unchanged sellable inventory, quarantine-plus-one, and a refund-ledger side effect. Behavior for other conditions and unobserved amount validity domains is unknown.
